NetRef.description: A reference to a net document, optionally aliased.

alias.description: Local name used by wires to refer to this net. A simple identifier (no '.') so that <alias>.<placeName> is unambiguous. If omitted, the alias defaults to the referenced net's `name` field.

ref.description: Source-relative filesystem path to a net document conforming to spec/net-schema.md.

PortEndpoint.description: One end of a wire: an alias and a port name on the net referenced by that alias.

net.description: Alias of the referenced net (matches some nets[].alias, or the derived default).

port.description: Name of the port (a place declaring a `port` facet) on the referenced net.

Wire.description: A unidirectional cross-net arc from an output port to an input port.

description: A composition document: one or more referenced nets, aliased, joined by unidirectional wires between their ports.

nets.description: The nets to merge. At least one is required; composition is meaningful with two or more.

wires.description: Unidirectional wires joining an output port to an input port. An empty array yields a disjoint union (no cross-net flow).

title: Composition
